meaning: [复]n.(由美国第四十任总统Ronald Reagan实行的包括强调供给理论等内容的)里根经济政策
examples: First of all, even before the current crisis Reaganomics had failed to deliver what it promised.
What drives economic growth and prosperity is incentives for increased production, as Reaganomics proved.
Yet, much of the rest of the world, ironically, has learned the lessons of Reaganomics.
These policies of overregulation and cheap dollar monetary expansion were the opposite of Reaganomics.
